summary: The `docker buildx bake` integration test failed because a Dockerfile RUN step attempted to download the nydus binary from GitHub via `wget`, but GitHub returned an HTTP 502 Bad Gateway error, causing the build step to exit with code 1.
root_cause: A transient network error (HTTP 502 Bad Gateway) from github.com caused the wget command in the nydus Dockerfile stage to fail: `wget https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases/download/$NYDUS_VERSION/nydus-static-$NYDUS_VERSION-$TARGETOS-$TARGETARCH.tgz` returned exit code 1.

evidence.quote: #72 0.149 wget: server returned error: HTTP/1.1 502 Bad Gateway or Proxy Error
evidence.reason: The wget command received a 502 Bad Gateway response from github.com, indicating a transient network/server error.

evidence.quote: #72 ERROR: process "/bin/bash -c wget https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases/download/$NYDUS_VERSION/nydus-static-$NYDUS_VERSION-$TARGETOS-$TARGETARCH.tgz" did not complete successfully: exit code: 1
evidence.reason: The build step failed with exit code 1 due to the wget failure.

evidence.quote: ##[error]buildx bake failed with: ERROR: failed to solve: process "/bin/bash -c wget https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases/download/$NYDUS_VERSION/nydus-static-$NYDUS_VERSION-$TARGETOS-$TARGETARCH.tgz" did not complete successfully: exit code: 1
evidence.reason: GitHub Actions reported the bake failure with the same root cause — the wget download failed due to the 502 error.

suggested_fix: Retry the CI job, as this is a transient network failure (HTTP 502 from GitHub). Alternatively, consider caching the nydus binary or using a more resilient download mechanism with retries in the Dockerfile.

summary: The test `test_no_truststore_can_install[GitHub]` failed because pip could not download a package from GitHub, receiving repeated HTTP 502 errors. This is a transient network failure, not a code defect. The test was retried 3 times and failed each time.
root_cause: GitHub returned repeated 502 errors when pip tried to download https://github.com/pypa/pip-test-package/archive/refs/heads/master.zip, causing the test to fail with 'Max retries exceeded with url: /pypa/pip-test-package/archive/refs/heads/master.zip (Caused by ResponseError(\'too many 502 error responses\'))'.

evidence.quote: ERROR: Could not install packages due to an OSError: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='github.com', port=443): Max retries exceeded with url: /pypa/pip-test-package/archive/refs/heads/master.zip (Caused by ResponseError('too many 502 error responses'))
evidence.reason: This is the actual error from pip showing that GitHub returned 502 errors repeatedly, indicating a transient network/server-side failure.
The test was retried 3 times and failed each time, consistent with a persistent transient network issue during the CI run.
Final test failure summary confirming only this one test failed out of 1080 passed, pointing to an isolated network issue rather than a code regression.

suggested_fix: Re-run the CI job; the failure is due to transient GitHub 502 errors and not a code issue. Consider adding retry logic or marking this test as network-dependent to allow skipping on network failures.

summary: One Jest test failed in `test/config/get.ts`: the test `pnpm config get reads npm options but ignores other settings from .npmrc` expected the registry URL without a trailing slash but received one with a trailing slash. This caused the entire CI job to exit with code 1.
root_cause: The `pnpm config get` command returns the scoped registry URL `@my-org:registry` with a trailing slash (`https://my-org.registry.example.com/`) but the test expects it without one (`https://my-org.registry.example.com`). The trailing slash is likely being added by the config-reading logic or npm's URL normalization.
relevant_tests: pnpm config get reads npm options but ignores other settings from .npmrc

evidence.reason: This is the exact assertion mismatch — the received value has a trailing slash that the test does not expect.
The test at line 32 of test/config/get.ts asserts the exact URL without a trailing slash.

evidence.quote: Test Suites: 1 failed, 3 skipped, 61 passed, 62 of 65 total
evidence.reason: Confirms only one test suite failed, and it is the config/get.ts suite.

suggested_fix: Update the `pnpm config get` implementation to strip trailing slashes from registry URLs before returning them, or update the test to accept a trailing slash if that is the intended behavior.
